skills.name: euclidean-thinking
skills.tags: First-principles reasoning, problem decomposition, and systematic truth-building via Euclid's axiomatic method. Load before decomposing complex problems, constructing arguments, debugging systems, building from scratch, or learning new domains.

skills.name: nightly-momentum-engine
skills.tags: Autonomous weekly synthesis of all LifeOS data through the full STEM stack to produce morning intelligence — trajectory analysis, bottleneck identification, simulated futures, and top actions for maximum compound growth.

skills.name: pilot-dashboard
skills.tags: Read-only modular web dashboard for visual tracking of life metrics, wiki graph, property pipeline, and activity log. No browser input — all updates happen server-side via Hermes cron or scripts. Displays data from JSON state files.

skills.name: probabilistic-thinking
skills.tags: Pre-analysis checklist for decisions involving data, uncertainty, or probability. Load before analyzing data, making forecasts, evaluating claims, or drawing conclusions from samples. Based on Mlodinow's The Drunkard's Walk + Kahneman & Tversky.

skills.name: thinking-in-bets
skills.tags: Decision-making under uncertainty — probabilistic thinking applied to real choices. Load before any high-stakes decision, when evaluating past outcomes, or when forming/defending beliefs. Based on Annie Duke's Thinking in Bets.

skills.name: warp-speed-execution
skills.tags: STEM-grounded frameworks for maximizing execution velocity with guardrails. Load when speed of progress is the priority — career acceleration, skill acquisition, project delivery, life compounding.

bottleneck.what: Zero analysis-to-action conversion — planning IS the avoidance
bottleneck.why: 3 runs, 6 prescribed actions, 0 completions. The planning system (reports, reviews, braindumps) has become the primary activity, replacing execution. The 'fix-brain-first' axiom is the 5th postulate — shatter it.
bottleneck.unlocked_by: Stop generating analysis. Execute one microscopic action within 48 hours. Scale actions down to 2-5 min, not 15-30 min.

forecast.bear: 0 actions completed. Fourth report generated and ignored. Taxes hit 120+ days stalled. No exercise for 5+ weeks. Planning loop continues.
forecast.base: 1 micro-action completed (easiest item). Token progress. 0% streak broken but structural pattern unchanged.
forecast.bull: Taxes call made (hardest item). Housing agent texted. WIP slashed to 5. Exercise resumed. Requires external trigger.

top_actions.action: Find the Yesmytaxes phone number and write it on a sticky note.
top_actions.impact: First 2 min of the 5-min worst-first. Drops activation energy for the call by 80%.

top_actions.action: Send ONE text to Savannah at Schuber Mitchell: 'Hi, interested in new construction Bentonville/Centerton under $400K. Available for a call?'
top_actions.impact: Unlocks housing pipeline. Text is lower friction than a call.

top_actions.action: Put on workout shoes and walk to the end of the street.
top_actions.impact: Breaks 24-day exercise drought. Friction is the transition, not the activity.

calibration.calibration_error: Consistently over-predicting base/bull when base rate is 100% bear. Bear probability should be 0.60+.

patterns: 0% action completion across 3 runs (6 total actions) — momentum engine prescriptions consumed as content, not converted to action
Taxes stalled 110+ days — 'talk to yesmytaxes' prescribed 2 weeks in a row, 15 min of work, untouched
WIP growing despite pruning advice: 13→15. Each run adds analysis, doesn't remove tasks
Habits dead: exercise last logged May 28 (24 days), sleep and meditation NEVER logged (created 3 months ago)
momentum_analysis.mantra: Plans don't break chains. Steps do.
